overview: Seattle Integrative Hormone & Thyroid Clinic provides telehealth hormone and thyroid care across Washington State using a functional endocrinology approach. Care is led by Dr. Summer Baptist, ND, L.Ac., MPH, with over 20 years of clinical experience in integrative medicine.
highlights: Comprehensive functional lab testing (thyroid, hormone, cortisol, metabolic, and gut analysis)
targetAudience: Patients with thyroid or hormone symptoms seeking root-cause evaluation, particularly those with persistent symptoms despite 'normal' lab results.
